# HYWE Core Engine: Full Technical Reference

This document provides a highly technical, deep-dive architectural manual of the **HYWE Core Engine** (`vykrum/Hywe`) for AI agents, compilers, and developers.

---

## Workspace Structure

The project is a zero-dependency, functional-first codebase structured into three F# projects under the [src](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src) directory:

### 1. [Hywe.Tree](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Tree)
A pure functional library governing the abstract hierarchical data structures.
*   [Types.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Tree/Types.fs): Defines tree node models, core record structures, and Elmish action primitives.
*   [Operations.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Tree/Operations.fs): Contains recursive operations for tree node manipulation (insertion, deletion, reordering).
*   [Serialization.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Tree/Serialization.fs): Handles JSON and custom text-based serializations of abstract hierarchical states.
*   [Visualization.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Tree/Visualization.fs): Converts standard tree node structures into visual-oriented tree nodes.

### 2. [Hywe.Core](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core)
The geometric and topological computation engine.
*   [Nexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Nexel.fs): Core nodes, attributes, and basic topological configurations.
*   [Lexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Lexel.fs): Parsing system translating compressed `HYWE Syntax` strings into `TreeNode` models.
*   [Hexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Hexel.fs): Defines the **Hexel** (hybrid-grid grid coordinate unit) and basic grid operations.
*   [Goxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Goxel.fs): Grid configuration, graph relationships, and spatial coordinate grids.
*   [Coxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Coxel.fs): Manages simultaneously evolving Hexel clusters forming macro spatial structures.
*   [Xyxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Xyxel.fs): Resolves 2D spatial layouts, boundary conformance, and planimetric layouts.
*   [Zaxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Zaxel.fs): Computes 3D vertical stacking, programmatic layers, and volumetric massing vectors.

### 3. [Hywe.Web](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web)
The client-side UI, rendering pipelines, and Bolero/Elmish runtime environment.
*   [Main.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/Main.fs): The primary application controller holding the Elmish Model-View-Update (MVU) loops.
*   [IN-NodeTree.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/IN-NodeTree.fs): Interactive tree editor sidebar.
*   [IN-PolygonEditor.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/IN-PolygonEditor.fs): Drawing canvas for complex, custom 2D site boundary polygons.
*   [VZ-Layout.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Layout.fs): Combines modular panels and manages core viewport logic.
*   [VZ-Graphics.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Graphics.fs): Renders procedural 2D plans in the browser using SVG vector graphics.
*   [VZ-ThreeD.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-ThreeD.fs) & [VZ-Shaders.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Shaders.fs): Interactive 3D rendering pipeline leveraging raw WebGPU buffers and vertex shaders.
*   [VZ-Teach.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Teach.fs): The core interactive interface for automated design variation processing and dataset curation.

---

## Mapping Core Concept Implementations

AI agents modifying or reviewing this codebase must maintain the integrity of the following topological paradigms:

### 1. Deterministic Topology
*   **Concepts**: Layout configurations must emerge strictly as a mathematical consequence of declared topological adjacency, without random stochastic placement or CAD dragging.
*   **Code Location**: [Goxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Goxel.fs) and [Coxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Coxel.fs) resolve proximity and spatial containment. The coordinates are calculated iteratively by adding discrete vectors on a hexagonal grid, ensuring that adjacent nodes in the tree remain adjacent in the physical layout.
*   **Rules**: Never introduce random generators (`System.Random`) inside core geometric solvers. Every spatial layout output must be 100% reproducible given the same syntax input.

### 2. Architectural Programming
*   **Concepts**: Converting architectural layout rules (circulation, floor areas, program designations) into functional boundaries.
*   **Code Location**: [IN-NodeTree.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/IN-NodeTree.fs) registers user inputs, which are parsed and recursively handled via F# Pattern Matching in [Operations.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Tree/Operations.fs).
*   **Rules**: Maintain standard F# immutable programming. When executing modifications to trees, return a new structural state instead of mutating existing records.

### 3. Spatial Hierarchy
*   **Concepts**: Complex structural containment where spatial components are resolved as hierarchical layers (e.g., L0 = Site, L1 = Massing, L2 = Program blocks).
*   **Code Location**: [Xyxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Xyxel.fs) recursively splits structural zones. It uses the weight ratios (`R` attribute) of nested sibling tree nodes to compute proportional boundary subdivisions.
*   **Rules**: Child layout subdivisions must strictly respect the parent boundaries computed in the previous recursion pass.

### 4. Base34 Topology Encoding
*   **Concepts**: Storing hierarchical structures, constraints, and attributes in highly compressed, URL-safe alphanumeric strings.
*   **Code Location**: [Lexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Lexel.fs). The parsing module translates compact Base34 notation:
    *   `R`: Target spatial weight ratio.
    *   `B`: Outer structural boundaries.
    *   `I`: Islands / Void regions.
    *   `T`: Thickness / Layer heights.
*   **Rules**: Base34 decoding uses custom mapping arrays in `Lexel.fs`. Ensure all new attributes introduced to the parser have valid character bindings that do not conflict with the existing character alphabet `0-9` and `A-W` (excluding ambiguous characters like `I` and `O`).

### 5. Integer-Based Partitioning
*   **Concepts**: All grid definitions, coordinates, and intersection calculations must be executed strictly with integer coordinates to prevent browser-specific rounding discrepancies.
*   **Code Location**: [Hexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Hexel.fs). This file defines spatial positions using discrete lattice coordinates:
    ```fsharp
    type HexelCoord = { Q: int; R: int }
    ```
*   **Rules**: Do not use standard F# `float` or `double` math inside [Hexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Hexel.fs) or [Goxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Goxel.fs). Use strict integer multiplication and division. Floating-point numbers are only permitted at the final rendering stage in [VZ-ThreeD.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-ThreeD.fs) and [VZ-Graphics.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Graphics.fs).

### 6. Semantic Architectural Intent
*   **Concepts**: Structuring generative dataset records by mapping architectural programming constraints and prompts with completed, functional layouts.
*   **Code Location**: [VZ-Teach.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Teach.fs) captures layout runs. When users commit designs, it calls `VZ-Teach.fs` to post JSON payloads containing `definition`, `description`, and `configuration` (as a 24-element string array of sweep layouts) to the private Hynteract serverless endpoint, which compiles them into `.jsonl` datasets for Hugging Face.

---

## Architectural Flow & WebAssembly Pipeline

The client-side F# engine executes a sequence-driven pipeline on every design change:

1.  **State Management**: Bolero/Elmish registers user actions in [Main.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/Main.fs).
2.  **String Parsing**: If loading from a URL hash or import, [Lexel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Lexel.fs) parses the Base34 string into a `TreeNode` state.
3.  **Adjacency Graphing**: [Goxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Goxel.fs) builds spatial cell configurations based on the `TreeNode` structure.
4.  **2D Layout (Xyxel)**: [Xyxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Xyxel.fs) executes integer-based boundary partitioning and produces 2D layout vectors.
5.  **3D Extrusion (Zaxel)**: [Zaxel.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Core/Zaxel.fs) reads thickness rules (`T` attribute) and layers these 2D layouts into stacked 3D coordinates.
6.  **Graphics Dispatch**:
    *   *SVG Viewport*: Renders vector plans via [VZ-Graphics.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Graphics.fs).
    *   *WebGPU Viewport*: [VZ-ThreeD.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-ThreeD.fs) maps the 3D meshes to GPU vertex buffers, rendering volumetric models.
7.  **Data Export**: [VZ-Teach.fs](file:///c:/Users/vykru/source/repos/Hywe/src/Hywe.Web/VZ-Teach.fs) serializes layout tokens, coordinates, and descriptions, and sends them to the serverless `Hynteract` endpoint.
